gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor excitedly moves both arms up and down while smiling, expressing enthusiasm about today's lesson
a person leans slightly forward, extending both hands in a welcoming gesture toward the learners
a tutor raises both hands to show five fingers on one side, then five fingers on the other while explaining
a person bends down slightly, uses one hand to display five fingers, then raises the other hand to show five more
a tutor brings both hands together, moving them in a counting motion as if combining the fingers while encouraging applause
a person stretches both arms outward, smiling and encouraging the class to think about the addition problem at hand
a tutor points thoughtfully to the class, moving hands back and forth as if illustrating fingers or objects to count
a person raises both arms high with excitement, nodding and smiling broadly while celebrating the correct answer
a tutor stands tall, extending both arms wide while announcing the conclusion of the lesson with a big smile
a person claps hands together joyfully, moving side to side while praising the students for their great work
